description_for_human: Access Moody's credit ratings, rating history, and default probability data.
description_for_model: Provides access to Moody's credit ratings APIs. Use this plugin to retrieve issuer-level and issue-level credit ratings, rating history, and probability of default estimates. Essential for credit risk assessment, fixed income analysis, and counterparty due diligence.

functions.name: get_issuer_rating
functions.description: Retrieve Moody's credit rating for an issuer (company/organization) including current rating, outlook, and rating history.

identifier.description: Issuer identifier value (e.g., ticker symbol, CUSIP, ISIN, or LEI)

identifier_type.description: Type of identifier: ticker, cusip, isin, or lei

as_of_date.description: Optional ISO 8601 date to retrieve rating as of a specific date (e.g., 2024-01-15)

functions.name: get_issue_rating
functions.description: Retrieve Moody's credit rating for a specific financial instrument (bond, note, structured product) including rating and watch status.

identifier.description: Security identifier value (e.g., CUSIP or ISIN)

identifier_type.description: Type of identifier: cusip or isin

as_of_date.description: Optional ISO 8601 date to retrieve rating as of a specific date (e.g., 2024-01-15)

functions.name: get_rating_history
functions.description: Retrieve the complete history of Moody's rating changes for an issuer or issue, including upgrade/downgrade dates and reasons.

identifier.description: Issuer or security identifier value (e.g., ticker symbol, CUSIP, ISIN, or LEI)

identifier_type.description: Type of identifier: ticker, cusip, isin, or lei

functions.name: get_default_probability
functions.description: Retrieve Moody's probability of default estimate and expected loss rate for an issuer based on Moody's credit models.

identifier.description: Issuer identifier value (e.g., ticker symbol, CUSIP, or ISIN)

identifier_type.description: Type of identifier: ticker, cusip, or isin
